title: Lessor must accept performance by assignee or sublessee
doc_html:
§131.  Lessor must accept performance by assignee or sublessee

A mineral lessor must accept performance by an assignee or sublessee whether or not the assignment or sublease is filed for registry.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §131, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
doc_text:
§131.  Lessor must accept performance by assignee or sublessee
A mineral lessor must accept performance by an assignee or sublessee whether or not the assignment or sublease is filed for registry.
Acts 1974, No. 50, §131, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
